decisions.rationale: The observation resolves to entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit). The base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is already the correct registry record with matching entity_name 'MTA New York City Transit' and entity_type 'agency'. The source quote 'New York City Transit' from the Open House slides matches this canonical agency record. Since the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is new (already resolved to the correct canonical record).

The observation resolves to entity_nyc-dot (New York City Department of Transportation). The base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is already the correct registry record with matching entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation' and entity_type 'agency'. The source quote 'NEW YORK CITY DOT' from the Open House slides matches this canonical agency record. Since the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is new (already resolved to the correct canonical record).
